channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Brain surgery for pituitary tumor helps Illinois mother have second child
item.description: A suburban Chicago woman who feared she might not have another child celebrates a growing family after brain surgery at Northwestern Medicine.

item.title: RFK Jr. seeks access to Americans' medical records for autism and vaccine research
item.description: U.S. health secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. is pursuing federal access to most Americans' medical records to research a possible link between vaccines and autism.

item.title: FDA approves first treatment for chronic hepatitis delta virus infection
item.description: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration has approved Hepcludex (bulevirtide-gmod) injection to treat chronic hepatitis delta virus (HDV) infection in adults.

item.title: Can Yogurt Help Prevent Colon Cancer?
